title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 7 - Moving (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science course that includes a section on artificial intelligence taught by Brian Yu. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with supporting communities on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
writeup: This live, unedited session is Chapter 7 ("Moving") of CS50's introduction to artificial intelligence track, taught by Brian Yu as part of Harvard University's introductory computer science course. It situates AI instruction within CS50's broader offering, which reaches learners through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. Supporting communities exist on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
